observed_failure.surface: SkillGuard supervision of six installed LogicGuard skills
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: an exact installed target projection remains current while its declared checks are supervised
observed_failure.observed_result: default supervision recompiled the installed projection as if it were a complete source tree, omitted intentional source-only fixtures from the content plan, rewrote installed contract hashes, and invalidated the installation receipt

classification.error_signature: installed compiled contract hash differs after successful target installation

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the supervisor default always invoked the source compiler even when skill_root was the active CODEX_HOME installation projection
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the model distinguished source-maintenance roots from installed consumer roots and asserted that installed supervision is read-only over the current contract pair
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: an active installed projection loads its exact current compiled contract and check manifest without compilation or mutation; source roots continue to compile

generalized_repair.rule: Default supervision compiles source-maintenance roots but read-loads current authority for the exact active CODEX_HOME skills projection.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: an installed target with intentionally absent source-only fixtures supervises without calling the compiler and without changing contract or manifest bytes
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: ordinary source roots still compile before supervision and stale installed authority still blocks
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the repair adds no compatibility reader, fallback authority, selectable mode, or target-domain semantics

required_revalidation: transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed self-host
LogicGuard six-target reinstall and installed supervision
claim_boundary: This review covers the source-versus-installed runtime-pair boundary. It does not prove any target Guard semantics or publication state.
